data.content: Plan review requested revisions. The current plan is directionally correct on the UI cleanup and multi-select state shape, but it drops all scanned-agent import actions by removing both ScannedAgentRow Add and ScannedAgentsList Add All without defining a replacement section-level add flow. Before implementation, revise the plan to name the retained add control, how it submits one or many selected models, and where the wiring lives after onAdd/onAddAll are removed. Also make the Codex rename scope explicit for provider-id consumers outside agent-identity.ts, including vendor-key mappings like settings/terminal agent info surfaces and impacted tests.
